description_long: This community center is a large, single-story complex with a distinctive series of conical black roofs, each topping a blue-walled section of the building. The structure is arranged in a roughly rectangular layout, with a central courtyard and multiple wings extending outward, all enclosed by a black perimeter fence. The main entrance is marked by a wide, paved pathway leading to a set of double doors, flanked by landscaped greenery and a driveway with parking space. The rear of the building features additional service areas, including what appears to be utility installations and a separate, smaller building. Windows are symmetrically placed along the blue facades, providing ample natural light to the interior. The overall design is modern, with clean lines, minimal ornamentation, and a focus on geometric forms.
description: A modern, blue-walled community center with multiple conical black roofs, a central courtyard, and a fenced perimeter. The building features a prominent main entrance, landscaped pathways, and a separate utility area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, landscaped pathway, driveway, and the symmetrical arrangement of conical roofs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the building, the alignment of the conical roofs, and the driveway area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the central courtyard, utility installations, and the separate smaller building within the fenced area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the building's depth, the arrangement of the wings, and the parking/utility zones.
attribute_entrance_design: The main entrance is centrally located at the front, featuring a wide, paved approach flanked by landscaped greenery. The entrance appears to have double doors, likely glass or metal, integrated into the blue facade. No visible ramps or steps are present, and the entrance is architecturally aligned with the building's modern, geometric style.
attribute_architectural_style: Contemporary style with modern geometric forms, characterized by conical black roofs, blue facades, large windows, and minimal ornamentation.
